user.title: Mitchell Shire Council
user.description:
Select the zone whose coordinates will be used to look up your bin schedule. Usually this is **zone.home**.

*This integration is not affiliated with or endorsed by Mitchell Shire Council.*

data_description.zone: The Home Assistant zone whose latitude and longitude will be sent to the Mitchell Shire Council API.
data_description.bin_scan_interval: How often to refresh bin collection schedules (hours). Bin schedules rarely change, so a longer interval is fine. Default is 50 hours.
data_description.enable_events: Create sensors and a calendar for upcoming Mitchell Shire council events.
data_description.enable_news: Create a sensor for the latest Mitchell Shire council news.

error.zone_not_found: The selected zone entity was not found in Home Assistant.
error.zone_no_coordinates: The selected zone does not have latitude/longitude attributes.

data_description.bin_scan_interval: How often to refresh bin collection schedules (hours). Default is 50 hours.
